title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Trainer the Brave. Thou hast saved
the Umamusume princesses.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold the fruits of thy labor. Princesses from
across the realms owe their lives to thee.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite your triumph, dark clouds shall
inevitably befall this world once again...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In truth, these princesses were demon lords all
along. I leave them under thy watch until the Day
of Awakening dawns.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, hero. Direct sunlight is their only
weakness... Take care not to forget the words of
Queen Golshi, brave one...
